data.body: Ported in 7ab54921: revert_core/revert_cli (find-by-uuid, reject REVERT-of-REVERT, REVERT event via seam, ARCHIVED->marker-clear, confirmation line). Dual-run green bash AND python on test-ticket-id-resolution-direct-exec (41) + test-bridge-observability-e2e (23) + new revert_core parity tests. Default stays bash.
